title: ceanothus × pallidus f. plenus
intro: Ceanothus × pallidus f. plenus, also known as the pink wreath ceanothus, is a flowering shrub that is a hybrid of the Ceanothus × pallidus and Ceanothus guineifolius species. It has been used in herbal medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties, which help to soothe and calm the body. The health benefits of Ceanothus × pallidus f. plenus include reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. This plant is commonly prepared as a tea or tincture, and its leaves and flowers can also be used to make infusions and salves.
